Omega_form: Omega = sum_{l=0..g} cof(M)^(g-l) B_l ; B_l = c1_l x c2_l + sum_{i<l}(M^{l-i}c1_i)xc2_l + sum_{j<l}c1_l x(M^{l-j}c2_j); c1_0=c2_0=delta=a'-a
B1_explicit: B_1 = sigma1 x tau1 + Delta x (tau1 - sigma1),  Delta = M.delta
